CustomField.description: If checked, the earlybird discount will only be available to the main booker on a multi-person booking. If unchecked, as many earlybird discounts will be assigned as possible to the bookings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, the earlybird discount will only be available to the main booker on a multi-person booking. If unchecked, as many earlybird discounts will be assigned as possible to the bookings.
CustomField.label: Earlybird discount on first booking only
